checks.ask_snapshot: Look/smell the coolant: clean smell, no thick tramp-oil layer/scum/foam? Any rust films on parts/ways/worktable?
checks.answer: off smell / tramp oil / rust films

reported: Machine stopped. There is a red light on the screen, and it got very hot during the last cut.
sanity_notes: I don’t know of any change. Same job, same titanium part, and nobody touched it that I saw. I did notice the coolant smells a bit off, and the finish has been getting worse.
resolution_note: Okay, I wrote it down — 3 before, added a little premix, and I’ll put the new reading in after it runs.
